## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what's wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Connect wallet / click '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 126]
- Wallet: [e.g. MetaMask 12.x]
- Network: Arc Testnet (chain id 5042002)
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14]

## Additional context

- Transaction hash (if relevant):
- Console errors (if any):
- Anything else that might help diagnose the issue.
